verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
rcases t with ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩, hU⟩
    simp [Subtype.ext_iff, secondInvo, secondInvo_fun] at ht
    have hyz : y = z := by linarith
    have h_prod : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← hS, hyz]; ring
    have y_div : y.natAbs ∣ 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← Int.natAbs_of_nonneg (by linarith [hy, k_pos k] : 0 ≤ 4 * k + 1), ← h_prod, Int.natAbs_mul]
      apply dvd_mul_right
    cases (Fact.out : (4 * k + 1).Prime).eq_one_or_self_of_dvd _ y_div with
    | inl h =>
      have hy1 : y = 1 := by rwa [← Int.natAbs_of_nonneg hy.le, h, Nat.cast_one]
      have hxk : x = k := by linarith [hy1, h_prod]
      have hz1 : z = 1 := by linarith [hy1, hyz]
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff, hy1, hxk, hz1]
    | inr h =>
      have : y = 4 * k + 1 := by rwa [← Int.natAbs_of_nonneg hy.le, h]
      linarith [hx, k_pos k, h_prod]
  · intro ht
    simp [Subtype.ext_iff, ht]
